headline: Why Is Teradyne (TER) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor testing company Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) jumped 13.8% in the afternoon session after the company reported record-breaking first-quarter 2026 financial results that surpassed analyst expectations, driven by strong demand for artificial intelligence applications.
